welcome_bot: 👋 Welcome to GUARDIAN X ULTIMATE! I am your all-in-one group management bot. Use the menu below to explore all features.
group_panel_title: 🛡️ Guardian X — {title} ⚡ Full inline admin panel Select a category to manage your group:
error_admin_only: ⛔ This panel is for group admins only.
channel_info_text: 📢 Official Channel Follow us for the latest news, updates and announcements! 🔔 Join now: @VPS24H
security_menu: 🛡️ Security Center Configure protection for your group:
lock_menu: 🔒 Lock System Toggle content locks for your group:
mod_ban_prompt: 📌 Reply to a message or provide @username to ban.
mod_mute_prompt: 📌 Reply to a message or provide @username to mute.
mod_warn_prompt: 📌 Reply to a message or provide @username to warn.
provide_user: ❌ Please reply to a message or provide a user ID/@username.
error_group_only: ❌ This feature is only available in groups.
error_admin_required: ❌ Bot needs admin permissions for this action.
error_generic: ❌ An error occurred. Please try again.
error_self_action: ❌ You cannot perform this action on yourself.
error_higher_rank: ❌ You cannot perform this action on an admin.
error_no_permission: ❌ You don't have permission for this action.
stats_menu: 📊 Statistics View rankings, activity, and growth data:
my_stats_text: 👤 {name} ⭐ Level: {level} 📊 XP: {xp} / {xp_needed} {bar} 💫 Total XP: {total_xp} 💰 Balance: {balance} coins 🏦 Bank: {bank} coins ⭐ Reputation: +{pos_rep} / -{neg_rep} ⚔️ Duels: {wins}W/{losses}L ({winrate}% WR)
daily_stats_text: 📅 Daily Statistics 👥 Total Users: {total_users} 🆕 New Today: {new_users} ⚡ Actions (24h): {actions}
welcome_menu: 👋 Welcome Settings Configure your group welcome message:
goodbye_menu: 👋 Goodbye Settings Configure your group goodbye message:
welcome_set_prompt:
✏️ Send the new welcome message.

Variables: {name}, {group}, {id}
welcome_variables: Variables: {name} = user name, {group} = group name, {id} = user ID
log_channel_set_hint: Forward a message from the log channel to the bot in private chat to set it as the log channel.
log_events_menu: 📋 Log Events Toggle which events to log:
autodel_menu: 🗑️ Auto Delete Select how long to keep messages:
help_menu: ❓ Help Center Select a topic to learn more:
help_security_text: 🛡️ Security Features • Anti-Spam — detects repeated messages • Anti-Flood — limits rapid-fire messages • Anti-Raid — detects mass join attacks • Anti-Bot — blocks unauthorized bots • Anti-Link — blocks links from non-admins • Captcha — verifies new members • Lock System — restrict content types • Emergency Mode — full lockdown
help_moderation_text: ⚖️ Moderation Features • /ban — permanently ban a user • /unban — remove a ban • /kick — remove a user from the group • /mute — restrict a user from sending messages • /unmute — restore a user's ability to send • /warn — issue a warning (auto-action at max) • /unwarn — remove a warning • /notes — add notes to a user • /history — view user action history
help_economy_text: 💰 Economy Features • Daily/weekly/monthly rewards • Wallet (cash + bank) • Deposit and withdraw • Transfer coins to others • Transaction history • Leaderboard rankings
help_games_text: 🎮 Games • 🎲 Dice — bet and roll • 🎡 Spin Wheel — multiple multipliers • ✊ Rock Paper Scissors • 🃏 Card Battle — higher card wins • 🔢 Number War • 💣 Minesweeper • 🎰 Roulette
help_commands_text: 📋 Admin Commands /ban @user [reason] — ban /unban @user — unban /kick @user [reason] — kick /mute @user [time] [reason] — mute /unmute @user — unmute /warn @user [reason] — warn /unwarn @user — remove warn /notes @user — user notes /history @user — action history
help_duels_text: ⚔️ Duels & Tournaments • Challenge users with /duel @user [amount] • Loser pays the winner • Win streaks give bonus rewards • Tournament rankings tracked globally
help_gameslist_text: 🎮 Game List 1. 🎲 Smart Dice — multiple modes 2. 🎡 Luck Wheel — multiplier spins 3. 🃏 Card Battle — highest card wins 4. 🔢 Number War — highest number wins 5. ✊ Rock Paper Scissors — classic! 6. 💣 Minesweeper — reveal safe cells 7. 🎰 Roulette — test your luck
help_achievements_text: 🏅 Achievements Earn 100+ achievements across 5 categories: 🎮 Games — wins, streaks, mastery 💰 Economy — savings, spending, records 📊 Activity — messages, rewards, levels 🤝 Community — referrals, reputation 🎪 Events — tournaments, seasonal challenges
tournaments_menu: 🏆 Tournaments Compete with users across all groups! Win prizes and climb the rankings:
no_active_tournaments:
📭 No active tournaments right now.
Check back later for upcoming events!
invalid_amount: ❌ Invalid amount. Please enter a positive number.
no_active_group: ❌ No active group context. Use this in a group.
referral_desc: Invite friends and earn {reward} coins per referral!
bank_hint: Use Deposit to move coins to the bank (safe from theft). Use Withdraw to move coins back to your wallet.
transfer_enter_user: ↗️ Transfer Coins Enter the @username or user ID to transfer to:
transfer_enter_amount: ✅ Transferring to {name}. Now enter the amount:
transfer_user_not_found: ❌ User not found. Try again with a valid @username or user ID.
transfer_success: ✅ Transferred {amount} coins to {name}! Your new balance: {balance}
